title: zappania globiflora
side_effects: Zappania globiflora can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea, diarrhea, and stomach cramps in individuals who consume it excessively. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can also lead to headaches, fatigue, and dizziness. In severe cases, improper use of Zappania globiflora can cause liver damage and kidney failure, which may require immediate medical attention. It is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes.
